Hardware Component File

CMFB_CEPS_TKP_V4_8

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference CMFB_CEPS_TKP_V4_9_20190701T170650.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 742
Receive ID 762
Functional Addr 04
Functional Name Direction assistée
